mapper.select: SELECT l.id, c.code AS courseCode, c.name AS courseName, c.credits, u.name AS professorName, l.room, l.schedule, l.capacity, l.year, l.semester FROM lectures l JOIN courses c ON l.course_id = c.id JOIN users u ON l.professor_id = u.id ORDER BY l.year DESC, l.semester DESC, c.name ASC
